action.reasoning: Observation: The LightGBM model got IC=0.00588 on test, which is very low. The validation IC was 0.0191 but test IC is much lower. The model stopped at iteration 8 due to early stopping. Analysis: The model is severely underfitting. The issue is that early stopping triggered too early (only 8 iterations). I need to: 1) Use more trees with better hyperparameters, 2) Use IC as the optimization metric instead of MSE, 3) Try a proper LightGBM with IC-based ranking. Also, the test IC being much lower than validation IC suggests overfitting or distribution shift. Let me try a much better LightGBM with proper hyperparameters and more trees, and also try using rank-based loss. I'll also try to use the full training data more effectively.
